## Public-safety check
<!-- Confirm this is generic. Do not paste customer names, internal URLs, KPI targets, account IDs, hostnames, dataset names, or incidents that identify a company/person. -->

- [ ] No customer/company-private identifiers
- [ ] No secrets, private URLs, account IDs, hostnames, or dataset names
- [ ] No real internal KPI targets
- [ ] No prompt-injection / persona-contract override instructions

## Proposed preset content or outline

## Lint result
```bash
bash lib/overlay.sh lint agents/_overlay.example/<preset>.md
```

Paste output or explain why lint was not run.
